description: Style NoteFresh from doodle's range of tops, myntra stocks the prettiest ones for your little one. Perfectly suited for her whimsical taste, this piece looks good paired with denim skirts or capris.Product DetailsRed top, has a round neckline, cap sleeves, printed and sequinned detail on the chest, bow detail on the left and branding above the hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldTumble dry lowUse cool iron
